BigQuery-backed prototype · LLM-assisted interpretation

Biomarker Observatory

Explore longitudinal trends, same-visit relationships, and correlation structure across your cohort. Use filters to narrow the slice, then ask targeted questions with context.

Source: —Rows: —Reports: —

Filters

Narrow the cohort; empty biomarker selection loads all markers in range.

Patient ID (Optional)

Biomarkers

Load data to list markers.

Drill level:Click a data point to drill into that year

Longitudinal trend(by year)

Mean biomarker level aggregated by year. Click a data point to drill down.

Select biomarkers and apply filters to plot trends.

Longitudinal trend (monthly mean)

Mean biomarker level by calendar month across all patients in the current filters.

Select biomarkers and apply filters to plot trends.

Same-visit scatter

Each point is one patient visit with both biomarkers present.

Need overlapping visits for both axes.

Correlation heatmap

Pearson correlation on paired values at the same patient + visit.

Waiting for biomarker list…

Ask about relationships (LLM)

Ask any question about the biomarkers, trends, or indicators shown on this dashboard. Only health-dashboard-related questions are accepted.

OLAP cube navigator

Click any bar to filter. Active filters propagate to the dashboard like Looker Studio cross-filtering.

Mode: sliceGrain: month
Dims: time × biomarker (slice: patient)
Load data and select biomarkers to render the cube.
